_meta.purpose: Honesty ledger. (1) §§ with NO sourceable heading. (2) repo-citation errors the spine now EXPOSES (Phase B repo-code fixes). (3) data-quality follow-ups (secondary→primary confirmations, wording variances). Fetch date 2026-05-27.
_meta.headline: ZERO unverified headings: every one of the 1,569 §/Art. captured across federal + 16 states carries a verbatim official heading at primary-source or secondary-mirror tier. The items below are repo-code findings and quality follow-ups, NOT corpus holes.

repo_citation_findings_phase_b.evidence: Current NBauO Inhaltsübersicht: § 65 'Bautechnische Nachweise, Typenprüfung' → § 66 'Abweichungen'. No § 65a. Confirmed against baunormenlexikon.de AND NI-VORIS / lexsoft / Haufe.
repo_citation_findings_phase_b.correct: The structural-/bautechnischer Nachweis in NBauO is § 65. stateCitations.ts should cite '§ 65 NBauO'.
repo_citation_findings_phase_b.phase: B (repo-code fix). Surfaced by verify-citations.mjs --strict as an EXISTENCE finding.

repo_citation_findings_phase_b.evidence: § 8 GEG official heading = 'Verantwortliche' (responsible parties), not a thermal-insulation certificate.
repo_citation_findings_phase_b.correct: Wärmeschutz-/Energiebedarfsnachweis → GEG § 10 (Grundsatz und Niedrigstenergiegebäude); Energieausweis → GEG § 80. (t01-neubau-efh.ts:14 already maps it correctly to § 10; line 145 contradicts it.)
repo_citation_findings_phase_b.phase: B (repo-code fix). Surfaced by verify-citations.mjs --strict as 3 ROLE findings.

data_quality_followups_phase_b_or_c.next_step: Upgrade to primary-source via official consolidated PDFs (the gesetze-bayern.de/pdftotext avenue that worked for Bayern; recht.nrw.de for NRW). Phase C calibration pass.

data_quality_followups_phase_b_or_c.item: Cross-check vs repo stateCitations.ts archetype mapping — candidate repo errors
candidates: HBO § 49 corpus heading = 'Blitzschutzanlagen', but stateCitations.ts maps '§ 49 HBO' = permitSubmission (Bauvorlageberechtigung). Bauvorlageberechtigung is HBO § 67. Likely repo error.
HBO § 66 corpus = 'Baugenehmigungsverfahren', stateCitations.ts maps '§ 66 HBO' = permitForm. The Bauantrag/Bauvorlagen § is HBO § 69. Likely repo error.
LBO BW § 73a corpus = 'Technische Baubestimmungen', stateCitations.ts maps '§ 73a LBO BW' = structuralCert. Verify the structural-cert § for BW in Phase B.
LBO BW § 58 corpus = 'Baugenehmigung', stateCitations.ts maps '§ 58 LBO BW' = permitForm (the permit itself, not the application form).
data_quality_followups_phase_b_or_c.next_step: Confirm against the official portal, then correct stateCitations.ts in Phase B. (Existence-clean, so NOT a --strict failure; these are concept→§ mapping mismatches the verifier cannot auto-detect.)

data_quality_followups_phase_b_or_c.item: Wording variances to confirm against an official portal (Phase B)
variances: NRW § 64: recht.nrw.de (primary) = 'Vereinfachtes Baugenehmigungsverfahren'; baunormenlexikon mirror = 'Einfaches Baugenehmigungsverfahren'. Primary used.
Saarland § 63: first full-TOC fetch mis-rendered it as § 64's heading; re-fetch + saarheim.de confirm = 'Baugenehmigungsfreistellung'. Corrected heading recorded.

Saarland §§ 60/61/63: baunormenlexikon vs saarheim.de minor wording variance ('Verfahrensfreie Vorhaben' vs '…Bauvorhaben'; 'Baugenehmigungsfreistellung' vs 'Genehmigungsfreistellung'). baunormenlexikon reading used.
NBauO § 73a: mirror returned the same heading as § 73 ('Bauvoranfrage und Bauvorbescheid') — likely a TOC duplication artifact; confirm against official source.
LBO SH § 58a 'Bestehende Anlagen': genuinely present in the mirror TOC (coincidentally the number once fabricated for Bayern — here it is real). Confirm against official source.
data_quality_followups_phase_b_or_c.next_step: Single official-portal confirmation per item in Phase B/C where exact wording matters.
